ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* Unique Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) code for each county */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county's geographical center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county's geographical center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for county election officials */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for county election officials */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Party ID of the candidate */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the candidate */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the candidate */,
  "political_experience" INTEGER /* Years of political experience */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's campaign website */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the party's current chairperson */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the party's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the party's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout entry */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "turnout_stage" TEXT /* Stage of voter turnout */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  "early_voting_turnout" INTEGER /* Number of early voting participants */,
  "absentee_voting_turnout" INTEGER /* Number of absentee voters */,
  "provisional_voting_turnout" INTEGER /* Number of provisional voters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES counties ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "absentee_votes" (
  "absentee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each absentee vote entry */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes */,
  "absentee_method" TEXT /* Method used for absentee voting */,
  "early_absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes cast early */,
  "mail_absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes cast by mail */,
  "drop_box_absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes cast through drop boxes */,
  "absentee_votes_counted" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes counted */,
  "absentee_votes_rejected" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes rejected */,
  "absentee_votes_reasons" TEXT /* Reasons for absentee votes being rejected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("absentee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absentee_votes_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES counties ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "precinct_reporting" (
  "reporting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting entry */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "reporting_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of precincts reporting */,
  "precincts" INTEGER /* Total number of precincts */,
  "precincts_reporting_early" INTEGER /* Number of precincts reporting early results */,
  "precincts_reporting_final" INTEGER /* Number of precincts reporting final results */,
  "total_early_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of early votes */,
  "total_absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of absentee votes */,
  "total_provisional_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of provisional votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precinct_reporting_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES counties ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security entry */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "security_protocol" TEXT /* Security protocol implemented */,
  "last_audit" TEXT /* Date of the last audit */,
  "last_penetration_test" TEXT /* Date of the last penetration test */,
  "next_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the next audit */,
  "security_incidents" INTEGER /* Number of security incidents reported */,
  "security_incidents_details" TEXT /* Details of the security incidents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_security_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES counties ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "report_link" TEXT /* Link to the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_reports_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES counties ("fips")
)
column_names: Unique Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) code for each county
State where the county is located
Number of registered voters in the county
